tools.name: indexOperations.configureIndex
tools.description: This operation specifies the pod type and number of replicas for an index.

tools.name: indexOperations.createCollection
tools.description: This operation creates a Pinecone collection.

tools.name: indexOperations.createIndex
tools.description: This operation creates a Pinecone index. You can use it to specify the measure of similarity, the dimension of vectors to be stored in the index, the numbers of replicas to use, and more.

tools.name: indexOperations.deleteCollection
tools.description: This operation deletes an existing collection.

tools.name: indexOperations.deleteIndex
tools.description: This operation deletes an existing index.

tools.name: indexOperations.describeCollection
tools.description: Get a description of a collection.

tools.name: indexOperations.describeIndex
tools.description: Get a description of an index.

tools.name: indexOperations.listCollections
tools.description: This operation returns a list of your Pinecone collections.

tools.name: indexOperations.listIndexes
tools.description: This operation returns a list of your Pinecone indexes.

tools.name: vectorOperations.delete
tools.description: The `Delete` operation deletes vectors, by id, from a single namespace. You can delete items by their id, from a single namespace.

tools.name: vectorOperations.describeIndexStats
tools.description: The `DescribeIndexStats` operation returns statistics about the index's contents, including the vector count per namespace and the number of dimensions.

tools.name: vectorOperations.fetch
tools.description: The `Fetch` operation looks up and returns vectors, by ID, from a single namespace. The returned vectors include the vector data and/or metadata.

tools.name: vectorOperations.query
tools.description: The `Query` operation searches a namespace, using a query vector. It retrieves the ids of the most similar items in a namespace, along with their similarity scores.

tools.name: vectorOperations.update
tools.description: The `Update` operation updates vector in a namespace. If a value is included, it will overwrite the previous value. If a set_metadata is included, the values of the fields specified in it will be added or overwrite the previous value.

tools.name: vectorOperations.upsert
tools.description: The Upsert operation writes vectors into a namespace. If a new value is upserted for an existing vector id, it will overwrite the previous value.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
